category_sources: source_facts.description says icloudpd is a tool to download photos from iCloud.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage/repo use the official repository name icloud_photos_downloader; source_facts.name provides the icloudpd command/package identifier.
docs_sources: Official GitHub Pages documentation site for icloud_photos_downloader is the dedicated docs surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains an official repository URL, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies iCloud photo downloading; source_facts.executables lists icloudpd and icloud commands.
